title: Remove, refit and adjust bicycle accessories
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Remove, refit and adjust bicycle accessories demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to remove, refit and adjust bicycle accessories

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Interpret bicycle accessory removal and fitting instructions and check accessory specifications against customer requirements1.3 Inspect accessories for quality and compare with customer requirements1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.5 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Prepare work area and plan work to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Interpret bicycle accessory removal and fitting instructions and check accessory specifications against customer requirements1.3 Inspect accessories for quality and compare with customer requirements1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.5 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Prepare work area and plan work to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Interpret bicycle accessory removal and fitting instructions and check accessory specifications against customer requirements1.3 Inspect accessories for quality and compare with customer requirements1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.5 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Prepare work area and plan work to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to remove, refit and adjust bicycle accessories

elements.title: Remove accessories

pcs.text: Identify and check accessories to be removed or repaired according to manufacturer specifications2.2 Remove accessories in line with planned sequence according to workplace instructions and without causing damage to bicycle frame, other components and accessories
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and check accessories to be removed or repaired according to manufacturer specifications2.2 Remove accessories in line with planned sequence according to workplace instructions and without causing damage to bicycle frame, other components and accessories?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and check accessories to be removed or repaired according to manufacturer specifications2.2 Remove accessories in line with planned sequence according to workplace instructions and without causing damage to bicycle frame, other components and accessories.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Remove accessories

elements.title: Fit, test and adjust accessories

pcs.text: Determine required positioning of new or repaired accessories regard to operational requirements, aesthetics and customer requirements3.2 Refit bicycle accessories according to job requirements, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Test and adjust refitted accessories as required according to job requirements and customer requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine required positioning of new or repaired accessories regard to operational requirements, aesthetics and customer requirements3.2 Refit bicycle accessories according to job requirements, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Test and adjust refitted accessories as required according to job requirements and customer requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine required positioning of new or repaired accessories regard to operational requirements, aesthetics and customer requirements3.2 Refit bicycle accessories according to job requirements, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Test and adjust refitted accessories as required according to job requirements and customer requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Fit, test and adjust accessories

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm bicycle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm bicycle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm bicycle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes
